channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Saturday, May 2, 2026
item.description: Three threads deserve your full attention this Saturday. The Musk-Altman trial is surfacing hard evidence about AI model distillation and the long-term talent pipeline implications of AI displacing entry-level professional work — both directly relevant to your consulting thesis. ...
